TranslationContext: This file contains UI strings from menus and gameplay. Some strings contain rich text formatting wich should be kept intact in the translated string.

Translations.Comment: Refers to a group of soldiers/warriors. 'Banda' conveys a military unit in a fantasy setting.
Placeholder text for input fields. Neutral, functional tone.
Used in UI for primary/main options. Standard terminology.
Used in UI for secondary options. Standard terminology.
Option for customizing icon color in menus.
UI label for icon. Note the leading space is intentional.
Standard save button. Concise and formal.
Confirmation message for copy action. Maintains formal, clear tone.
Army point total label. Wargame terminology.
Unit count label for army builder. Military terminology.
Shows minimum unit requirement. Functional notation.
Weapons category. Direct translation for equipment.
Unit banners/standards. Classic fantasy military term. Newline preserved.
Equipment/item category. Generic term for wargame items.
Unit equipment tags. Military/fantasy armor terminology.
Confirmation question for deletion. Direct and formal.
Special weapon enchantments. Fantasy wargame terminology.
Enchantment name - evocative and maintains fantasy tone.
Groups of soldiers accompanying a leader. Formal military term from heraldry.
Button to add new unit in army builder. Standard terminology.
Placeholder for naming dialog. Functional and clear.
Effect of ability/enchantment. Game mechanics terminology.
Unit skill/stat. Wargame terminology for military prowess.
Attack power stat. Fantasy wargame term for combat strength.
Number of attacks in combat. Wargame stat.
Health/wound stat. Wargame terminology for unit durability.
Unit discipline/morale stat. Military fantasy terminology.

Translations.Translation: I cambiamenti non salvati andranno persi
Translations.Comment: Warning message. Maintains clear, direct tone.
Game title acronym - kept as-is per standard practice.
Menu item for feedback. Formal and clear.
Single-player campaign mode. Standard wargame terminology.
Campaign name - maintains epic fantasy tone. Dark and ominous.
Multiplayer mode. Standard gaming terminology in Italian.
Ranked multiplayer mode. Standard gaming terminology.
Custom match option. Clear and descriptive.
Play against AI. Abbreviated for UI space. Uses lowercase 'contro'.
Army composition tool. Clear and descriptive.
Game rules guide. Formal and clear.
Feedback option. Often left in English in Italian UIs.
Offline status. Typically left lowercase and in English.
Game server browser. Clear descriptive term.
Name for a multiplayer match. Formal terminology.
Create public multiplayer match. Direct and clear.
Create private multiplayer match. Direct and clear.
Join multiplayer match button. Standard terminology.
Quick battle against AI. Clear and direct.
Choose army list for battle. Functional term.
Formatted warband label with dashes. Maintains formatting.
Start button for match. Direct action. Newline preserved.
Small map/game size option. Direct descriptor.
Random map generation option. Clear and descriptive.
Standard battlefield scenario. Classic wargame terminology.
DLC/content name. Evocative and maintains dark fantasy tone.
Edit army list button. Direct and clear.
Create new army list. Direct and clear.
Confirmation for list deletion. Formal and direct.
List preset with point value. Maintains wargame terminology.

Translations.Translation: Seleziona una Lista di Pattuglia di Confine
Translations.Comment: Game mode selector. Maintains fantasy military terminology. Newline preserved.
Next step indicator. Simple and clear.
Variant version or alternative setup. Standard game terminology.
Placeholder for 'To Be Determined'. Left in English as it's standard abbreviation.
Campaign conclusion message. Dramatic and conclusive.
Challenge modifier for stronger boss units. Direct translation.
Challenge modifier where enemies regroup. Evocative military term.
Challenge modifier for elite units. Direct terminology.
Challenge modifier with smaller initial army. Clear descriptive term.
General difficulty modifier. Direct and clear.
Resource constraint modifier. Wargame currency terminology.
Difficulty options menu. Clear and descriptive.
Button to resume in-progress campaign. Direct action term.
Quit/abandon current campaign. Maintains serious tone.
Confirmation for abandoning campaign. Formal and direct.
Competitive ranked mode. Clear game mode term.
Player rating label. Standard gaming terminology.
Elo rating system. Left as-is - standard esports terminology.
Player statistics view. Standard gaming term.
Hire/recruit new unit. Military recruitment terminology.
Matchmaking search status. Maintains action tone.
Statistics showing units used. Clear and descriptive.
Fullscreen display option. Standard UI terminology.
Audio volume control. Standard UI terminology.
Window resolution setting. Standard UI term.
Music volume control. Standard UI terminology.
Camera effect setting. Technical but clear.
Visual zoom setting for unit icons. Technical descriptive term.
Back button in menus. Standard UI term.
Minor magical effects/spells. Fantasy terminology from D&D tradition.
Unit banners/standards category. Military fantasy terminology.
Special commander unit from DLC. Clear descriptive term.
Battle phase indicator. Urgent and clear.
Primary battle objective. Military fantasy tone.
Defensive battle objective. Clear and direct.
Objective not yet held by anyone. Standard wargame terminology.
Objective being fought over. Military strategy terminology.
Points abbreviation - consistent with existing translations

Translations.Translation: Un Nemico si Unisce a Te
Il tuo comandante guadagna un livello!
Assassinio completato. Riscatta il tuo premio!

Translations.Key: Your regiment returns in the morning. But something has changed them...
Translations.Translation: Il tuo reggimento ritorna al mattino. Ma qualcosa li ha cambiati...

Translations.Key: The lost regiment is found! Some soldiers are missing, but those who remain have strenghtened resolve.
Translations.Translation: Il reggimento perduto è trovato! Alcuni soldati mancano, ma quelli rimasti hanno una risolutezza rafforzata.

Translations.Comment: Keep Elo as international rating term
Main menu access. Simple and clear.
Battle phase identifier. Maintains formal phase notation.
Auto-skip notification when no combat occurs. Direct and clear.
Battle phase identifier. Military cavalry terminology.
Battle phase identifier. Planning and positioning phase.
Battle phase identifier. Primary combat resolution phase.
Game turn indicator. Standard wargame terminology.

Translations.Key: You have first activation this phase.
Translations.Translation: Hai la prima attivazione in questa fase.
Translations.Comment: Turn order indicator. Maintains formal game terminology.

Translations.Key: Opponent has first activation this phase.
Translations.Translation: L'Avversario ha la prima attivazione in questa fase.
Translations.Comment: Turn order indicator. Clear and formal.
Unit activation button. Direct action term.
Multiplayer wait status. Maintains formal tone.
Turn order indicator. Direct first-person statement.
Phase skip button. Direct action term.
Combat action button. Direct cavalry/charge terminology.
Combat response option. Formal military terminology.
Auto-skip when no charges declared. Direct and clear.
Confirmation for phase skip. Formal and direct.
Skip/pass turn action. Direct game action term.
Unit activation prompt. Maintains formal phase notation.
Complete/finish action button. Short and clear.
Movement phase indicator. Maintains dash notation.

Translations.Key: -1 Movement. Ignore the movement penalty from Heavy Armor
Translations.Translation: -1 Movimento. Ignora la penalità di movimento dall'Armatura Pesante

Translations.Comment: Hero name. Maintains epic fantasy tone with classic title.
Enhanced weapon notation. Maintains game mechanics terminology.
Versus indicator. Left as-is - universally understood in gaming.
Unit name - combines creature type with rider term.
Combat position indicator. Military tactical terminology.
Combat position indicator. Military positioning terminology.
Game mechanics label. Standard gaming terminology.
Combat odds notation. Rich text formatting preserved.
Example/placeholder text - left as-is for template purposes.
Combat result notation. Rich text formatting preserved.
UI element label. Clear and descriptive.

Translations.Key: Dwarf Handgunners fire at the Orc Warriors!Dwarf Orc Warriors!Dwarf Handgunners fire at the Orc Warriors!
Translations.Translation: Le Milizie Nanici sparano ai Guerrieri Orcheschi! I Guerrieri Orcheschi! Le Milizie Nanici sparano ai Guerrieri Orcheschi!
Translations.Comment: Battle event message. Maintains action-packed tone.
Combat comparison display. Rich text formatting preserved.
Combat phase indicator. Maintains dash notation.
Morale buff description. Maintains inspirational tone.
UI element label. Direct and clear.
Game state indicator. Direct and clear.
Battle objective. Maintains urgent action tone.

Translations.Key: Shaving a dwarf can seem like a fun idea at the time, but it's not worth the consequences in the long run.
Translations.Translation: Radere un Nano può sembrare un'idea divertente al momento, ma non vale le conseguenze a lungo termine.

Translations.Key: You can roll dice by pressing Spacebar (    ). Hold it down to fast forward in combat.
Translations.Translation: Puoi lanciare i dadi premendo la Barra Spaziatrice (    ). Tienila premuta per accelerare il combattimento.

Translations.Key: Display charge ranges by pressing         -Your Units         - Opponents Units
Translations.Translation: Visualizza i raggi di carica premendo         -Tue Unità         -Unità dell'Avversario
Translations.Comment: Tutorial tip with key binding placeholder

Translations.Key: Also hold Shift to show Ranged Weapon ranges.
Translations.Translation: Tieni premuto Shift per mostrare i raggi d'azione delle Armi a Distanza.

Translations.Key: Found a bug or just want to talk about the game?
Translations.Translation: Trovato un bug o vuoi semplicemente parlare del gioco?

Translations.Key: Units always add their rank bonus to Discipline Tests
Translations.Translation: Le Unità aggiungono sempre il loro bonus di rango ai Test di Disciplina

Translations.Key: Flank and Rear charges add +1 to Combat Score!
Translations.Translation: Le cariche dai Fianchi e da Dietro aggiungono +1 al Punteggio di Combattimento!

Translations.Key: A units <color=#33FAFF>Skill</color> is a measure of its training and general ability to fight. It  detemines Hit Chance for close combat and ranged attacks.
Translations.Translation: L'<color=#33FAFF>Abilità</color> di un'unità misura il suo addestramento e la sua capacità generale di combattere. Determina la Probabilità di Colpo per combattimenti ravvicinati e attacchi a distanza.
Translations.Comment: Stat explanation - note typo 'detemines' in original

Translations.Key: The <color=#33FAFF>Power</color> stat describes a units physical strength and striking power. It's used in combat to overcome an opponents <color=#33FAFF>Defense.
Translations.Translation: La stat <color=#33FAFF>Potenza</color> descrive la forza fisica di un'unità e il suo potere di colpo. Viene usata in combattimento per superare la <color=#33FAFF>Difesa</color> di un avversario.

Translations.Key: The <color=#33FAFF>Defense</color> stat is a combination of a units general toughness and armor. It determines the units Damage Save against incoming attacks.
Translations.Translation: La stat <color=#33FAFF>Difesa</color> è una combinazione della resistenza generale di un'unità e dell'armatura. Determina il Tiro Salvezza Danno dell'unità contro gli attacchi in arrivo.

Translations.Key: The dice in SOVL are mathematically fair. They are also cursed by a demon, who is evil. But they are fair!
Translations.Translation: I dadi in SOVL sono matematicamente equi. Sono anche maledetti da un demone, che è malvagio. Ma sono equi!
Assassinio completato. Riscatta il tuo premio!

Translations.Key:
Less Starting Gold
Harder Minor Battles
Harder Elites
Smaller Starting Unit
Harder Bosses
Translations.Translation:
Oro Iniziale Ridotto
Battaglie Minori più Difficili
Elite più Forti
Unità d'Avvio Ridotta
Nemici più Forti

Translations.Comment: Campaign defeat message with character name

Translations.Key: Your army has been wiped out...
Translations.Translation: La tua armata è stata annientata...

Translations.Key: A trail of death behind you...
Translations.Translation: Un sentiero di morte dietro di te...

Translations.Comment: Unit name - consistent with faction translations

Translations.Key: Reroll Ranged and Combat Attacks against Cavalry and Chariots
Translations.Translation: Rilancia Attacchi a Distanza e di Combattimento contro Cavalleria e Carri

Translations.Comment: Map node type - common gaming term

Translations.Translation: Reintegra o addestra le tue unità

Translations.Key: This is a holy place. Your soldiers can ask for a blessing, but make your choice carefully.
Translations.Translation: Questo è un luogo sacro. I tuoi soldati possono chiedere una benedizione, ma scegli con attenzione.
(L'Unità rilancia i Tiri Salvezza Danno falliti)

Translations.Key: A mysterious altar covered in eldritch runes. Your soldiers can ask for a favor, but at what cost...
Translations.Translation: Un altare misterioso coperto di rune mistiche. I tuoi soldati possono chiedere un favore, ma a quale prezzo...

Translations.Key: Some rogue wizards have been spotted in the area. Eliminate them for a reward.
Translations.Translation: Alcuni maghi rinnegati sono stati avvistati nella zona. Eliminali per una ricompensa.

Translations.Key: Reward: 1 magic item for your commander
Translations.Translation: Ricompensa: 1 oggetto magico per il tuo comandante

Translations.Key:
Your army has found  a forgotten tomb in the wilderness. Does it contain ancient treasure or slumbering evil?





Form a search party to investigate or leave it be...
Translations.Translation:
La tua armata ha trovato una tomba dimenticata nella natura selvaggia. Contiene antico tesoro o male dormiente?





Forma una squadra di ricerca per investigare o lascia stare...

Translations.Key: Mercenaries are offering to join your warband in exchange for a cut of your income.
Translations.Translation: I Mercenari si offrono di unirsi alla tua banda in cambio di una percentuale del tuo reddito.

Translations.Key: Elven City Guard are expensive but skilled fighters.
Translations.Translation: Le Guardie della Città Elfica sono costose ma combattenti abili.

Translations.Key: You come across a treacherous swamp. As you attempt to cross it, one of your regiments fall behind and is lost in the fog. You can wait for them to return or risk sending a search party.
Translations.Translation: Incontri una palude traditorosa. Nel tentativo di attraversarla, uno dei tuoi reggimenti rimane indietro e si perde nella nebbia. Puoi aspettare il loro ritorno o rischiare di mandare una squadra di ricerca.

Translations.Key: A mercenary captain and his trusty gryphon offers to join your army for coin.
Translations.Translation: Un capitano mercenario e il suo affidabile grifone si offrono di unirsi alla tua armata in cambio di monete.

Translations.Key: A good place to purchase some firepower...
Translations.Translation: Un buon posto per acquistare potenza di fuoco...

Translations.Key: Your soldiers have found an ancient artifact. Make use of its power or sell it in the nearest settlement...
Translations.Translation: I tuoi soldati hanno trovato un artefatto antico. Usa il suo potere o vendilo nell'insediamento più vicino...

Translations.Key: +1 Power. Once per battle, cast the Fireball spell.
Translations.Translation: +1 Potenza. Una volta per battaglia, lancia l'incantesimo Palla di Fuoco.

Translations.Key:
An old dwarven weapon cache. We can probably salvage something.
 Pick one...
Translations.Translation:
Un antico deposito d'armi nanico. Possiamo probabilmente recuperare qualcosa.
 Scegline uno...

Translations.Key:
A shrine to the ancient Dwarven ancestors. 
This is a sacred place for all Dwarves.
Translations.Translation:
Un santuario per gli antichi antenati Nani. 
Questo è un luogo sacro per tutti i Nani.

Translations.Key: Gain the Lady's Blessing for the next 3 battles.
Translations.Translation: Ottieni la Benedizione della Signora per i prossimi 3 turni.

Translations.Key: (Your Knights are Fearless and have Charge Bonus: +1 Attack)
Translations.Translation: (I tuoi Cavalieri sono Senza Paura e hanno Bonus di Carica: +1 Attacco)

Translations.Key: The drums of war are sounding!

Translations.Translation: Il tuo Comandante guadagna un livello.

Translations.Key: Gain Tribal Fury for the next 3 battles.
Translations.Translation: Ottieni Furia Tribale per i prossimi 3 turni.

Translations.Key: (Your units are Fearless and have Charge Bonus: +1 Attack)
Translations.Translation: (Le tue unità sono Senza Paura e hanno Bonus di Carica: +1 Attacco)

Translations.Key:
A hideout in the trees, 
only known to the Deepwood Elves
Translations.Translation:
Un nascondiglio tra gli alberi, 
conosciuto solo agli Elfi della Foresta Profonda
Comunica con gli Spiriti della Foresta

Translations.Key: Gain Forest Spirits Aid for the next 3 battles.
Translations.Translation: Ottieni l'Aiuto degli Spiriti della Foresta per i prossimi 3 turni.

Translations.Key: (Your units have +3 Move Speed and +1 to Ranged Attack Rolls)
Translations.Translation: (Le tue unità hanno +3 Velocità Movimento e +1 ai Tiri di Attacco a Distanza)

Translations.Key: Deadly arrows crafted by the Deepwood Elves. Pick one.
Translations.Translation: Frecce mortali forgiate dagli Elfi della Foresta Profonda. Scegline una.

Translations.Comment: Rich text dice notation - W3 = Würfel3
Rich text comparison - keep as is
Battle result - preserve rich text tags
Test to see if unit breaks and flees
Morale state - unit close to breaking
Unit destroyed message - preserve leading space

Translations.Key: You can roll dice by pressing Spacebar. Hold it down to fast forward in combat.
Translations.Translation: Puoi lanciare i dadi premendo la Barra Spaziatrice. Tienila premuta per accelerare il combattimento.
